name: New England Style Baked Beans - Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
1. Completely soften the beans as directed above (Beans should be soft before mixing with sugar and syrup).
2. Drain, reserving 1 cup of liquid.
3. Put the beans in a CROCK-POT.
4. Add all remaining ingredients along with the 1 cup reserved bean liquid; mix well.
5. Cover and cook on Low for 10 to 12 hours (High: 4 to 5 hours, stirring occasionally).
6. Cut ham from bone and return to CROCK-POT.
7. If thicker beans are desired, uncover and turn to high during the last hour.
8. VARIATION: Stir in 2/3 cup catsup and 2 tablespoons prepared mustard during the last hour.
